creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
One system has 32 gigs RAM, ARC is limited to 16G. Another system has 64Gigs rAM, ARC wasn't limited. Actually, the primary use of these systems is iSCSI serving, so the only thing that consumes RAM is the ZFS itself.

I'll be happy to provide a dump next time I will see this, thanks.
